Off Calendar Dec-20-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Line 1. Andre C. Hunter, Judgement debtor in propria persona, No other appearance.

The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
The Judgment Debtor Andre C. Hunter's claim of exemption is Granted in part. Judgment debtor must pay $75 per pay period. Order signed and mailed to all parties. Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Not reported (302/CWW)

HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
